thesis_profile.market_mechanism: minimal 6-feature model derived from v79 single-factor cross-sectional IC analysis: 4 Tier-1 features with stable signs across regimes (realized_vol, intraday_realized_vol, distance_to_high, coinglass_top_trader_long_pct) plus 2 Tier-2 momentum features (relative_strength_20, momentum_20) with regime-conditional sign flip driven by per-timestamp cross-sectional median of momentum_20; reduces v74's 19-feature complexity to its IC-validated core, eliminating 13 noise / weakly-correlated features (basis_*, funding_*, oi_change, return_1, range_position, ema_slope, quote_volume_expansion, 3 weak CoinGlass features)
thesis_profile.directional_claim: rank top-20 liquid perp-covered names by linear combination of 6 IC-validated features: -0.30*z(realized_vol) -0.20*z(intraday_vol) +0.20*z(distance_to_high) -0.15*z(top_trader_long) + sign_regime*(0.15*z(relative_strength) + 0.10*z(momentum_20)) where sign_regime = clip(cross_sectional_median(momentum_20)/0.06, -1, +1)
thesis_profile.factor_formula: z = per-timestamp cross-sectional zscore. raw_score = (-0.30*z_realized_volatility_20 - 0.20*z_intraday_realized_vol_4h_to_1d + 0.20*z_distance_to_high_20 - 0.15*z_coinglass_top_trader_long_pct + sign_regime*(0.15*z_relative_strength_20 + 0.10*z_momentum_20)). sign_regime = clip(per_timestamp_median(momentum_20)/0.06, -1, +1) — continuous in [-1, +1]: positive in dispersed-up regime, negative in rotation/drawdown regime. Final = tanh((percentile_rank(raw_score) - 0.5) * 1.80).
